notes: Chain test: feed eval-1 research output through draft-spec → socratic-grill → decision-record. Tests integration AND each skill individually.

evals.name: spec-from-collab-editor-research
evals.input: Run draft-spec using the research output at tests/runs/iteration-1/eval-1/output.md (collaborative document editor — Yjs+Hocuspocus+Tiptap recommendation).
evals.expected_behavior: Phase 1 locates the research. Phase 2 extracts architecture, picks, tradeoffs, decisions, open questions. Phase 3 produces 5-8 vertical slices (not horizontal). Each slice has HITL/AFK label, acceptance criteria, test strategy, dependency. Output follows spec-template.md. Ends with 3 HANDOFF lines. Architecture sketch traces back to Yjs+Hocuspocus+Tiptap.

assertions.name: has_tldr
assertions.check: Output contains a TL;DR section near top

assertions.name: traces_to_research
assertions.check: Architecture mentions Yjs, Hocuspocus, AND Tiptap (the recommendation from research)

assertions.name: has_5_to_10_slices
assertions.check: Vertical slices section has 5-10 numbered slices

assertions.name: slices_are_vertical_not_horizontal
assertions.check: No slice titled like 'database layer', 'API layer', 'frontend' alone — each is feature-shaped

assertions.name: slices_labeled_hitl_or_afk
assertions.check: Every slice has HITL or AFK label

assertions.name: slices_have_acceptance_criteria
assertions.check: Each slice has Acceptance criteria with at least 2 checkboxes

assertions.name: slices_have_test_strategy
assertions.check: Each slice specifies Unit/Integration/E2E/Manual test type

assertions.name: slices_have_dependencies
assertions.check: Slices use 'Blocked by:' field

assertions.name: open_questions_carried_forward
assertions.check: Open questions from research appear in spec's open-questions section

assertions.name: three_handoff_lines
assertions.check: Ends with 3 HANDOFF: lines (grill/record/implementation)

evals.name: grill-collab-editor-spec
evals.input: Run socratic-grill against the spec from eval 1. Inventory open questions, grill each across the 7 axes, simulate resolution.
evals.expected_behavior: Phase 1 inventories the 4 open questions from research + any new ones from spec. Phase 2 grills each across 2-4 relevant axes (not all 7). Each item exits DECIDED, DEFERRED-WITH-TRIGGER, or OUT-OF-SCOPE. No 'we'll see' resolutions. Output uses grill-output-template. 2 HANDOFF lines.

assertions.name: has_tldr
assertions.check: Output contains TL;DR section

assertions.name: inventories_open_questions
assertions.check: Output has a 'Grilling agenda' section with 3+ items

assertions.name: uses_ambiguity_axes
assertions.check: References at least 3 of: performance, failure modes, scale, concurrency, migration, reversibility, observability

assertions.name: items_have_resolutions
assertions.check: Each item has explicit DECIDED / DEFERRED / OUT-OF-SCOPE marker

assertions.name: no_we_will_see
assertions.check: Output does NOT contain phrases like 'we will see', 'figure it out later', 'TBD' as final resolutions

assertions.name: deferred_have_triggers
assertions.check: Any DEFERRED items have a 'Revisit trigger' specified

assertions.name: spec_updates_listed
assertions.check: Output has 'Spec updates required' section

assertions.name: adr_candidates_listed
assertions.check: Output has 'ADR candidates' section

assertions.name: two_handoff_lines
assertions.check: Ends with HANDOFF: lines for spec update and record

evals.name: adr-from-collab-editor-decisions
evals.input: Run decision-record using the research, spec, and grill outputs as inputs. Produce ADR.
evals.expected_behavior: Locates ADR home (or asks). Numbers ADR. Title is present-tense action-oriented. Has all 7 ADR sections. Decision uses ACTIVE voice. Alternatives section has 2-4 alternatives from research. Revisit triggers from spec/grill.

assertions.name: has_status_field
assertions.check: Output has Status: field (Proposed/Accepted/etc.)

assertions.name: title_is_present_tense_action
assertions.check: Title starts with verb in present tense (Use, Adopt, Migrate, Implement, etc.)

assertions.name: has_context_section
assertions.check: Has Context section

assertions.name: has_decision_section
assertions.check: Has Decision section

assertions.name: decision_active_voice
assertions.check: Decision section uses 'We will' or 'We choose' (active voice)

assertions.name: has_consequences
assertions.check: Has Consequences section with positive and negative

assertions.name: has_alternatives_2_to_4
assertions.check: Alternatives Considered has 2-4 alternatives, each named

assertions.name: has_revisit_triggers
assertions.check: Has Revisit triggers section

assertions.name: references_upstream
assertions.check: References section links to research/spec/grill

assertions.name: two_handoff_lines
assertions.check: Ends with HANDOFF: lines (implementation ready, future research)
